legion.default_greeting: Are you here to join the Legion, or do you seek information?

idle: The new slaves will serve the Legion well.
Degenerates like you belong on a cross.
greeting: The Legion welcomes those with strength.
Are you friend or foe to Caesar?

rank_greetings.Idolized: Hail, friend of Caesar! The Legion welcomes you with open arms. What do you require?
rank_greetings.Admired: You have proven yourself a valuable ally. How may we serve Caesar?
rank_greetings.Liked: Greetings, friend. What brings you to our camp?
rank_greetings.Accepted: You are welcome here, outsider. State your business.
rank_greetings.Neutral: Are you here to join the Legion, or do you seek information?
rank_greetings.Shunned: Your reputation precedes you. Speak quickly and leave.
rank_greetings.Disliked: You have done much against Caesar. Be grateful I don't cut you down now.
rank_greetings.Hated: You are an enemy of Caesar. Any last words?

start.text: Are you here to join the Legion, or do you seek information?

information.text: The wasteland belongs to Caesar. The NCR rots from within - their democracy is their weakness. We bring order through strength.

brotherhood.text: The Brotherhood hides in their bunkers, hoarding technology they fear to use. They will be crushed in time.

join.text: The Legion welcomes those with strength. Prove yourself in battle, and you may rise among us.

join_denied.text: You have not yet proven yourself worthy. Return when you have served Caesar in some way.

work.text: The Legion always needs supplies. Bring us weapons, medicine, and we will reward you. Also, NCR dogtags are always welcome.

work_accept.text: Good. Bring what you can. Caesar rewards those who serve.

ncr_work.text: We need NCR supplies... and information. Bring us dogtags from NCR soldiers and you'll be well rewarded.

legion_centurion.default_greeting: You stand before a Centurion. Speak quickly.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Ah, the hero of the wastes. Caesar will hear of your visit. How may we honor you?
rank_greetings.Neutral: You stand before a Centurion. Speak quickly.
rank_greetings.Vilified: Guards! Seize this enemy of Caesar!

start.text: You stand before a Centurion. Speak quickly.

offerings.text: Good. Weapons, medicine, NCR tags - all are welcome. What do you bring?
